rule_metadata.author: frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Uncommon Network Connection Initiated By Certutil.EXE

rules.rule_text:
title: Uncommon Network Connection Initiated By Certutil.EXE
id: 0dba975d-a193-4ed1-a067-424df57570d1
status: test
description: 'Detects a network connection initiated by the certutil.exe utility.

  Attackers can abuse the utility in order to download malware or additional payloads.

  '
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/certutil
author: frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-09-02
modified: 2024-05-31
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \certutil.exe
    Initiated: 'true'
    DestinationPort:
    - 80
    - 135
    - 443
    - 445
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
